title: spermacoce thymifolia
intro: Spermacoce thymifolia, also known as Thymophylla, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce thymifolia include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
